title: Making Calls From Monday
excerpt:
Hey Monday, 
Do you have a manual about how to activate the option of making outgoing calls from your system using my extension in my PBX? 
Thanks.

posts.author: NikitaKarpushinVoice (Nikita)

Hey Monday,
